activeAbilities.name: Luv'a da booty
activeAbilities.description: If a friendly Pirate makes a Melee Attack action while within 6” of this model, you may have them gain +1 energy for each Moonstone that this character is in possession of.

activeAbilities.name: Reload [Shoot Pistol]
activeAbilities.description: The named ability can be used again. This ability cannot be used while this model is engaged.

arcaneAbilities.name: Shoot Pistol
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X+1 Impact Dmg.
Catastrophe: This character suffers 3 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Plunder
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target loses 1 Passive Ability of your choice until the end of turn and this model gains that ability.
Catastrophe: The resisting player may move this model 2".
